programmes.show_description: Catch up on another afternoon of fun and crafting on Hobbymaker! Some items may have sold out since original broadcast.

HobbyMaker Repeats.
HobbyMaker Repeats.
Join Hayley Smith and Sara Kear Smith for a collaboration show!
Sara Kear-Smith will be bringing us the brand new Makower Moody Hues pre-cuts, along with some brand new quilt patterns.
Hayley Smith is showcasing her beautiful variegated threads in a variety of colours and designs, along with some lovely new lap quilt kits.
Hayley Smith and Sara Kear-Smith are back together for another hour!
Michelle Clark joins us with an hour of storage solutions from Sewing Online.
Formed in 2004, Mark brings his passion for all things made of precious metal to Hobbymaker.
From clear craft stamps to MDF blanks, Polkadoodles have got everything you need for handmade cards, scrapbooking, mixed media and DIY crafting. Join Nikky Hall to find out more!
A crafter for over 20 years, Sentimentally Yours is the brand of Phill Martin, offering beautiful crafting products for all abilities and often selling out quickly. Don't miss out!
Join us for an hour of fun, insprations and deals from some of your favourite crafting brands.

It's that time of year... Design a Block 2026! Tune in this hour to order our beautiful new panel - it's our favourite yet!
Jennie Rayment is demonstrating this gorgeous traditional-looking patchwork quilt, with its subtle autumnal colours.
Discover the essential tools every maker needs!
...Dresden Swirlie: Jennie Rayment shows us how to tinker with texture this hour!
Fall in love with beautifully curated quilt kits, packed with coordinating fabrics and clear instructions to help you create stunning quilts with confidence.
From a humble needlecraft shop in 1990 to one of the UK's leading papercraft manufacturers, Hunkydory provides quality and quantity for new and established crafters alike.
Join Jess in her passion creating bespoke paper art pieces. Every piece is unique, often following a general silhouette or template.
Since 1977, Sizzix have led with imaginative solutions for every creative lifestyle.

Designed by Katrina Witten, Rowandean kits bring the beauty of nature into your home. Their designs have been at the forefront of hand embroidery kits for over 30 years.
